text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi's article on me was surprisingly
well received!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so this is the kind of regimen
<chrname> does with her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I heard all those rumors about excessively brutal
training, but this paints a whole different picture.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the article makes the rounds, those strange
rumors about me gradually begin to fade away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The days <chrname> and I spent with
Reporter Otonashi are over in what feels like the
blink of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Working late again? Are you thinking about your
race agenda?
choice_data_list: I see you're still at it as well.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I do this because I love it. That said, I'm not
here today to get my usual coverage on you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I've just now received word—you've been selected
to participate in the Twinkle Star Climax.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: You finally did it! So, how does it feel?!
choice_data_list: I had faith that we'd make it in.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I like the confidence! I take it you won't
relinquish the title of "greatest" to anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to take this opportunity to snap a photo
of you. How about one down by the training
track?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Great! That was perfect, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: We certainly made the most of the empty track.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I managed to get a rare shot of a trainer running down it at full speed!
choice_data_list:
I actually got pretty flustered when you
suddenly started running alongside me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I figured that was the best way to imbue the
image with a sense of realism. Phew... I can't
remember the last time I ran that hard.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You think so?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...I've finished my reporting for the day, so what
do you say to a casual chat?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Let's admire the scenery of the track...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: While we go for a light run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We do as she proposes and continue our talk
while jogging around the track.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You know how you complimented my speed back
there? Well, back in the countryside, I was known
for being fast.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I was quite proud of my speed when I was a child.
But one day...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: An Umamusume transferred into my class.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying, but she was incredibly
fast! The gap between us was such that I had no
hope of even touching her tail.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
So I quit track and field. The very idea of a human
winning against an Umamusume was absurd!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi rapidly picks up speed. It
takes everything I have to keep up with her!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
If I couldn't compete with her, I wanted to see her
crowned as the greatest! That was the selfish
dream I clung to!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
She was truly incredible! It may have been a
children's racing club, but she still finished in first
place over and over!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: But then! Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After crossing the finish line, Reporter Otonashi
suddenly comes to a stop.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...She lost in a major race. And because of that,
everyone refused to acknowledge that she was
the best runner in the club.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Her destiny changed that day. She possessed real
ability, and in terms of both talent and results,
she was probably the club's very best...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, she decided to quit racing... It
happens a lot, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes. A single defeat can decide one's fate. It can
forever close off a path that was once open to
you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But even now, I... I can't help but believe that she
was the fastest runner in the entire world.
choice_data_list: So that's why you created the new race series?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I suppose so... Though, that's not the only reason,
of course.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I think it's because of her that I'm using my
position as a reporter to show the world my
definition of the "greatest."

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I want as many people as possible to see it—the
moment a truly talented Umamusume proves her
strength.
choice_data_list:
That's why you want to attract a huge number
of spectators.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Right. I couldn't realize my childhood dream...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: But the Twinkle Star Climax is my other dream.
choice_data_list: I'm sure this will be an amazing race series.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I think so, too! Especially now that I know what
you'll be bringing to it.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Once again, congratulations on making it in. I'm so excited it almost feels like I'm the one who's going to be racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day when the "greatest" will be decided is
quickly approaching. <chrname> and I
have come this far...
choice_data_list: (I wonder if we can achieve our dream.)
(I wonder if we can achieve our dream.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our dream was born the day I promised I'd run
alongside <chrname>. There's no
turning back now.
